Home/Services
What We DO

Deck & Outdoor Living Services

Loudoun Decks provides residential deck and outdoor living services for homeowners in Loudoun County, Fairfax County, and Prince William County. Our focus is on planning and building outdoor spaces that fit each home and lifestyle.

Call (571) 655-7207

Free estimate • No obligation • Fully permitted builds

Our Outdoor Living Services

Loudoun Decks specializes in residential outdoor living projects across Northern Virginia. Whether you’re planning a new deck or improving an existing outdoor space, our services are designed to help homeowners create functional and well‑planned outdoor areas. Below is an overview of the services we provide.

Custom Deck Design & Build

From concept to completion, we design and build fully custom decks tailored to your space, style, and budget no templates, no shortcuts.

Read More

Deck Resurfacing

For homeowners with an existing deck, deck resurfacing is an option to update the look and usability of the space. This service focuses on improving the surface and appearance of an existing deck without building a completely new structure. Deck resurfacing can be a practical solution for extending the use of an outdoor space.

Read More

Bluestone Patios

Upgrade your outdoor space with a high-end bluestone patio — natural beauty, unmatched durability, and a timeless look.

Read More

Porches

Our porch projects are designed to create a comfortable transition between indoor and outdoor living. Porches can add usable outdoor space while maintaining a close connection to the home. We work with homeowners to plan porch layouts that fit their property and intended use.

Read More

Pergolas and Gazebos

We also build pergolas and gazebos as part of outdoor living projects. These structures can add definition and function to an outdoor space while complementing decks, patios, or landscaped areas. Each structure is planned based on the available space and homeowner goals.

Read More

Deck Stair Lighting

Custom built LED lighting systems installed directly into your deck stairs for safety and a luxurious evening atmosphere.

Read More

Trex Railings

Upgrade your deck with modern Trex railing systems and a custom cocktail top perfect for entertaining and relaxing.

Read More

Custom Fire Pits

Transform your backyard into a warm, inviting space with a custom-built fire pit perfect for relaxing nights and entertaining guests.

Read More

Under Deck Patios

Maximize your outdoor living space with a custom under-deck patio system protected from rain, clean, and perfect for relaxing or entertaining year-round.

Read More

Trex Calm Shell Resurfacing

Give your old deck a fresh, modern look with Trex Calm Shell a premium composite color designed for durability, style, and low maintenance.

Read More

Services FAQs

We provide custom deck construction, deck resurfacing, patios, porches, and pergolas or gazebos.
Yes. Loudoun Decks focuses on residential outdoor living projects.
We serve homeowners in Loudoun County, Fairfax County, and Prince William County in Northern Virginia.
Yes. We offer free consultations to discuss outdoor living projects.

Serving Northern Virginia Homeowners

Loudoun Decks provides outdoor living services across multiple regions. We are deeply committed to turning local backyards into beautiful focal points.

Loudoun County
Fairfax County
Prince William County

We regularly work in cities such as Ashburn, Leesburg, Sterling, Centreville, Reston, Woodbridge, and Manassas.

Ready to Start Your Outdoor Project?

Get in touch with our experts today to schedule your free consultation and transform your outdoor living space.

We offer the Perfect Decking Solution for your home to live Your Outdoor Dreams.
